data.name: gpt-4o-transcribe
data.description: Highest accuracy multilingual transcription model with token-based billing.

data.name: gpt-4o-mini-transcribe
data.description: Fast and cost-efficient transcription model with token-based billing.

data.name: whisper-1
data.description: Drop-in replacement for legacy Whisper with duration-based billing per second of audio.

data.name: gpt-4o-mini-tts
data.description: High-quality text-to-speech model for most use cases. Supports instructions and SSE streaming.

data.name: tts-1
data.description: Lightweight real-time text-to-speech model optimized for low latency. Does not support instructions or SSE streaming.

data.name: tts-1-hd
data.description: Higher-fidelity text-to-speech model for offline use. Does not support instructions or SSE streaming.
